name: writhing_stalker.live_spawn_footing_mcw
description: Spawn-footing proof for the first writhing-stalker live scene: debug-spawn exactly one writhing stalker one tile east in the McWilliams live-debug fixture, prove same-run save/writeback, and require saved active_monsters metadata for mon_writhing_stalker at offset [1,0,0]. This proves fixture/spawn footing only, not writhing-stalker behavior.

steps.label: debug_spawn_writhing_stalker_one_east
steps.preconditions: canonical dev-harness/McWilliams fixture is loaded and focused; debug spawn monster primitive starts from the main map screen
steps.expected_visible_fact: debug spawn monster helper returns to the live map after selecting writhing stalker and confirming the target tile one square east
steps.expected_immediate_state: one hostile mon_writhing_stalker should exist one tile east of the player, but this row is credited only through the later same-run saved active_monsters metadata gate
steps.failure_rule: debug menu wrong-screen, stale runtime, or missing same-run saved active_monsters mon_writhing_stalker metadata after save makes this debug-spawn row non-green
steps.next_step_gate: do not credit the debug-spawn writhing-stalker footing unless audit_saved_writhing_stalker_after_debug_spawn is green

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_before_writhing_stalker_spawn_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime baseline is recorded after debug-spawn writhing stalker and before the save/writeback request

steps.label: open_save_prompt_after_writhing_stalker_spawn
steps.abort_reason: screen text did not prove the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt before confirming the writhing-stalker spawn save
steps.expected_visible_fact: the case-sensitive Save and quit prompt is open after the debug-spawn writhing-stalker step; confirmation must not be sent before this prompt is proven

steps.label: confirm_save_after_writhing_stalker_spawn
steps.failure_rule: uppercase-Y confirmation is only trusted if the following saved-player mtime gate proves same-run writeback
steps.next_step_gate: saved active-monster metadata may be credited only when audit_player_save_mtime_after_writhing_stalker_spawn_save is green
steps.expected_visible_fact: the proven case-sensitive save prompt is confirmed with uppercase Y so the following mtime gate can prove same-run writeback

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_after_writhing_stalker_spawn_save
steps.abort_reason: saved-player file mtime did not advance after confirming the writhing-stalker spawn save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime advanced after the confirmed writhing-stalker spawn save, proving the following active_monsters audit reads same-run state

steps.label: audit_saved_writhing_stalker_after_debug_spawn
steps.abort_reason: saved active_monsters metadata did not contain mon_writhing_stalker at player-relative offset [1,0,0] after same-run debug-spawn save/writeback
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run saved active_monsters metadata contains mon_writhing_stalker one tile east of the player after the debug-spawn monster primitive

evidence_contract.claim: the harness can spawn a real mon_writhing_stalker in the current McWilliams live fixture and persist/audit it by saved active_monsters metadata
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for spawn footing
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No spawn-footing credit without startup/load, debug-spawn, save prompt, save mtime advance, and exact saved active_monsters metadata. This is not live behavior proof.
